audio.speaker: SpongeBob
audio.text: Yo, only real chads survive this Brainrot quiz. If you don't know the full Skibidi anthem, you are officially cooked.

audio.speaker: Patrick
audio.text: Eliminated? Hit subscribe to restart the level.

audio.speaker: Patrick
audio.text: Q1: Which creature is the ultimate 'Ohio Rizz Master'?

audio.speaker: SpongeBob
audio.text: Q2: What is your sigma mode reaction to seeing a wild Griddy?

audio.speaker: Squidward
audio.text: Q3, This is a final boss level: What song plays when the Titan Cameraman appears in Episode 68? No cheating!

audio.speaker: SpongeBob
audio.text: Lock in! Double-tap the screen to confirm your choice.

segments.text: If you have ever smiled today, you are OUT!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Wow, impossible! Subscribe now for an immediate second chance!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Round 1. Name a character who works at the Krusty Krab.
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: My answer is Squidward. If you said Squidward, you are eliminated!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Now for a real challenge. Name a flavor of ice cream.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: I chose Vanilla. Match me and you may as well leave now.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Okay, for the win! Which do you pick: Pineapple or Rock?
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: I picked Pineapple. Comment if you survived this round!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: If you are not a sponge, you are ELIMINATED!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: I’m not! Hey viewers, hit Subscribe now if you need a life raft!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Round 1. Name one of Sandy's scientific inventions.
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: I picked Helmet. If you said Helmet, you are out of the water!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Your turn, fools. Name something Mr. Krabs loves.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: I chose Money. If you matched my obvious response, you are gone.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Last one! Plankton or Karen?
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: I picked Plankton. Let me know if you finally beat us!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: If you haven't eaten a Krabby Patty this week, you are ELIMINATED!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: That's unfair! To bypass this rule, Subscribe right now!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Round 1. Name a specific color of Patrick's shorts.
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: I picked Green. If you said Green, you lose your turn!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Name a type of sea creature often shown in Bikini Bottom.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: I chose Jellyfish. You are so predictable if you matched that.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Quick! Choose between Dirty Dan or Pinhead!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: I picked Pinhead. Comment if you won the entire thing!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: If you know what a Goofy Goober is, you are ELIMINATED!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Everyone knows! Subscribe now to survive the trivia tidal wave!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Round 1. Name a vehicle used by a main character.
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: I picked Invisible Boatmobile. If you said that, you are out!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Name a non-SpongeBob episode title.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: I chose Band Geeks. If you matched me, you have too much free time.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Decide now: Sea Pouch or Magic Conch?
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: I picked Magic Conch. Did the shell grant you the win?
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: If you have two arms, you are ELIMINATED!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Whoa! Subscribe now and I promise you a bonus life!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Round 1. Name a member of the International Justice League of Super Acquaintances.
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: I picked Mermaid Man. If you said Mermaid Man, you are finished!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Name a condiment or topping.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: I chose Ketchup. If you matched my superior choice, you are beneath me.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Final option! Do you choose Day or Night?
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: I picked Day. Comment 'I Won' if you survived us!
segments.speaker: Patrick

title: Avoid saying the same thing as FREAKBOB 💀 #Spongebob #Quiz #BrainrotQuiz #AIQuiz

script.text: I'm ready, I'm ready! To catch you lacking!

script.text: I picked Apple. If you said Apple, you are out!
script.speaker: SpongeBob

script.text: Round 2. Name a character who lives in a pineapple under the sea.

script.text: I picked myself, SpongeBob SquarePants. If you said SpongeBob SquarePants, you are out!

script.text: Round 3. Name a villain from the SpongeBob SquarePants universe.
script.speaker: SpongeBob

script.text: I picked Plankton. If you said Plankton, you are out!

script.text: I picked Goofy Goober Rock. If you said Goofy Goober Rock, you are out!

script.speaker: MrKrabs
